c.d: The app provides a range of tools and features to customize collages, including adjusting borders, adding text, stickers, backgrounds, and filters.

c.d: The app includes built-in photo editing tools to enhance images, such as cropping, resizing, adjusting brightness and contrast, and applying filters.
The app allows users to easily share their collages on social media platforms like Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter.
The app offers a sufficient set of features and templates for free, without requiring a subscription or in-app purchases.
